_comment: DeepAxon configuration file. Update pixel_size_um with your own calibration values if using a different microscope/camera setup.
_fiji_comment: Path to your Fiji executable. Leave blank to be prompted on first run. Example: C:/Users/you/Downloads/fiji-win64/Fiji.app/fiji-windows-x64.exe

pixel_size_um._comment: Keys are cropped image widths in pixels. 4X uses original full-res width (no crop). Values are um/px.

_100x_comment: 100X conversion factor not yet calibrated. Physical unit output will be unavailable for 100X images until this is set. Set to: { '1440': X.XXX, '2880': X.XXX }

patch_size._comment: Patch size in pixels per magnification. Affects crop size and model input.

clahe._comment: Contrast Limited Adaptive Histogram Equalization. Applied during segmentation before patchifying. clip_limit=1.0 is very mild — minimal noise amplification.
